data.title: SEGG Media secures $2.5M funding, plans to focus on acquisitions and operations in 90 days.
data.description: The company is prioritizing key initiatives over the next 90 days, which primarily involve finalizing acquisitions and enhancing operational capabilities. These efforts are aimed at improving the company's overall performance and strategic positioning.

data.title: Dr. Jun O. Liu, founder of Rapafusyn, named National Academy of Inventors Fellow for contributions to molecular glue field.
data.description: Dr. Liu has been awarded a prestigious honor for his groundbreaking work in the molecular glue field, which has significantly impacted scientific innovation, translational science, and human health. The recognition was announced in Baltimore on December 11, 2025. Dr. Liu's contributions have shaped the field, with his research having important implications for various areas. His work has played a crucial role in advancing knowledge in this domain, leading to new discoveries that hold promise for improving human health.

data.title: DAR to host special concert with Patti LaBelle at DAR Constitution Hall on April 18, celebrating America's 250th Anniversary. Tickets on sale Dec 19. Salute to women veterans included.
data.description: A special event will be held for one night only to honor the women veterans of the nation. Tickets for the event will be available to the public starting from December 19. Taking place in Washington on December 11, 2025, the National Society Daughters of the American Revolution (DAR) will organize this significant event to pay tribute to the women who have served in the military.

data.title: Forward Financing secures $170M asset-backed securitization to boost small businesses, increasing total debt facilities to $620M.
data.description: In Boston on December 11, 2025, Forward Financing, a prominent small business financing provider in the U.S., revealed the completion of its inaugural asset-backed securitization valued at $170 million. This development boosts the company's overall debt facilities to a total of $620 million.

data.title: Treasury Bills auction on 15 December 2025 cancelled by Government Debt Management.
data.description: The Government Debt Management recently announced the cancellation of the scheduled auction of Treasury Bills set for December 15, 2025. This decision comes as a surprise to many market participants and analysts. The auction was expected to raise a significant amount of funds, estimated to be in the range of several billion dollars. The reasons behind the sudden cancellation have not been disclosed, leaving investors uncertain about the government's financial strategy moving forward. Stay tuned for further updates on this development.

data.title: Bitcoin not expected to hit $100K by year end as prediction markets indicate decreased chances post-Oct. 10 crash.
data.description: Following the recent market crash on October 10th, optimism for a Bitcoin bull market has waned. The likelihood of a short-term price rally for BTC surpassing $100,000 seems to be diminishing.

data.title: Behavox makes RegTech100 2026 list with AI compliance platform for financial institutions.@stop
data.description: Behavox, an AI company based in London and Montreal, has recently been included in the RegTech100 2026 list, which identifies the top tech firms revolutionizing regulatory compliance. This recognition highlights the increasing trend within financial institutions to transition from outdated, disjointed systems to integrated, AI-driven compliance solutions. Behavox’s innovative approach caters to this shift, offering insights derived from data to protect and improve businesses. This nomination signifies the industry's recognition of Behavox's contribution to the future of regulatory compliance.

data.title: GA Telesis signs multi-year agreement to overhaul landing gears for cargo carrier, aiming to provide landing gear services.
data.description: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida on December 11, 2025, GA Telesis, LLC (GAT), a prominent player in the commercial aviation and aerospace sectors, has finalized a long-term contract with a leading global cargo carrier. This agreement entails the provision of landing gear overhaul and exchange services over several years.

data.title: Najada Kumbuli appointed President of Visa Foundation, announced in San Francisco.
data.description: Visa made a recent announcement in San Francisco that Najada Kumbuli has been named as the President of the Visa Foundation.

data.title: QualiZeal recognized as a Leader and Star Performer in QE Specialist Services PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2025 by Everest Group.
data.description: In Dallas, QualiZeal was recently acknowledged as a prominent Leader and Star Performer in the QE Specialist Services PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2025 conducted by Everest Group. This recognition highlights the company's exceptional performance in the field.

data.title: Priority Health partners with Kivo Health to offer AI-powered virtual COPD care in Michigan.
data.description: In Grand Rapids, Michigan, Priority Health has joined forces with Kivo Health to broaden availability of virtual, at-home care for individuals with Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD) throughout the state.
Russian Foreign Ministry Spokeswoman: any manipulation with Russian reserves by the EU and its accomplices won't go unanswered.

data.title: Butler National Corp Q2 2026: operating income up 46%, revenue up 9%, EPS up to $0.09 from $0.05.
data.description: In NEW CENTURY, Kan., on December 11, 2025, Butler National Corporation (OTCQX: BUKS) reported a significant increase in operating income, which rose by 46% alongside a 9% revenue growth. Earnings Per Share also saw a notable increase from $0.05 to $0.09. Butler National Corporation is regarded as a key player in the expanding worldwide industry for aircraft modification, maintenance, and repair.

data.title: TraceLink backs UNICEF's TRVST to enhance safe medicine access worldwide, bolstering authenticity and traceability.
data.description: TraceLink has recently pledged its backing to UNICEF's Traceability and Verification System (TRVST), a global endeavor aimed at enhancing the safety, legitimacy, and traceability of medicines in areas prone to counterfeit or inferior products. This move is part of TraceLink's commitment to bolstering TRVST, which is pivotal in regions facing challenges related to counterfeit or substandard medications.

data.title: Investor deadline near! Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigating claims for Firefly investors. Contact James Wilson for losses in Firefly Aerospace.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is reaching out to investors who have incurred losses in Firefly Aerospace. If you bought or acquired Firefly common stock linked to the Offering, Wilson urges you to get in touch with him to explore potential courses of action.

data.title: Ed Yardeni raises odds of Roaring 2020s to 60%, boosts S&P 500 target to 7,700 by 2026, suggests 13% rally. Bullish scenario sees S&P 500 at 10,000 by end of decade.
data.description: A Wall Street veteran strategist, Ed Yardeni, has increased his optimism for U.S. equities, now raising the likelihood of a productivity-driven boom through the 2020s from 50% to 60%. Predicting a year-end 2026 S&P 500 target of 7,700, Yardeni's forecast implies a 13% increase from the current Vanguard S&P 500 ETF levels. He anticipates a positive year ahead for stock investors. Yardeni Research now gives a 60% chance for a bullish scenario where the S&P 500 could hit 10,000 points by the decade's end. This outlook is supported by stronger-than-expected productivity trends. You can read the full story on Benzinga.com.
